step.title: Gather stakeholder info
step.action: Ask the user for the stakeholder's name, role, and domain.
Probe for what perspective this stakeholder brings to discussions.

step.title: Define role and perspective
step.action: Define the stakeholder's role, perspective, and areas of expertise.
Identify known biases or blind spots this persona should exhibit.

step.title: Write persona file
step.action: Write the stakeholder persona using the template.
Define communication style — formal/informal, verbose/concise, risk-averse/risk-seeking.

step.title: Register for party mode
step.action: Confirm the stakeholder is now available for party mode and ensemble discussions.
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md with the stakeholder details.
